entitled by law to coverage of reasonable and necessary home health services. Therefore, 
a patient is entitled to have the costs of reasonable and necessary services reimbursed by 
Medicare without regard to whether there is someone available to furnish the services. 
However, where a family member or other person is or will be providing services that 
adequately meet the patient's needs, it would not be reasonable and necessary for HHA
